CustomField.description: Overall qualitative feedback written by Penny via Gemini after a Penny-Coached-Review assessment. Coach and admin read. Penny reads in subsequent coaching sessions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Overall qualitative feedback written by Penny via Gemini after a Penny-Coached-Review assessment. Coach and admin read. Penny reads in subsequent coaching sessions.
CustomField.label: Penny Feedback Summary
